---
title: "Neuroscience for Machine Learners"
description: "Dan Goodman and Marcus Ghosh's free online neuroscience course aimed at people with a machine learning background."
author: "synesis"
date: "2023-10-09"
categories: [neuroscience, machine learning, education, links]
image: cover.jpg
---

![Neuroscience for machine learners. Image: neuro4ml. ([Source](https://neuro4ml.github.io/))](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Dr. Dan Goodman's new open and free online course on neuroscience, "for people with a machine learning or similar background, co-developed by Marcus Ghosh [<https://neural-reckoning.org/marcus_ghosh.html>]."

I know I will be following along!

Course: <https://neuro4ml.github.io/>

Mastodon announcement: <https://neuromatch.social/@neuralreckoning/111205401235674294>

*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_neuroscience-for-machine-learners-activity-7117166009450438656-mT2N).*
